info.name: Zendesk Support API
info.description:
The Zendesk Support API provides programmatic access to the core resources of the Zendesk Support platform, including tickets, users, and organizations. It enables creating, reading, updating, and deleting support records, managing relationships between entities, and integrating Zendesk Support with external systems. The API uses JSON over HTTPS and supports authentication via OAuth 2.0 or API tokens.

Contact Support:
 Name: Zendesk Developer Support
